recommendations.title: Enhance BRSR and GRI ESG Reporting Quality
recommendations.description: Improve ESG disclosures in BRSR FY26 and GRI reports to avoid SEBI scrutiny and potential trading restrictions.
recommendations.profitability_link: Avoiding SEBI penalties and trading restrictions can prevent cost of capital increase by 20-40 bps, saving ₹40-₹80 Cr annually.

recommendations.title: Develop and Disclose Comprehensive Transition Plan
recommendations.description: Create a detailed coal-to-renewables transition roadmap aligned with TCFD and CDP frameworks to improve ESG ratings and investor confidence.
recommendations.profitability_link: Improved ESG disclosure can reduce cost of capital by 20-40 bps, saving approximately ₹60-₹120 Cr annually on debt servicing.
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Tata Power's ESG transition plan led to P/E rerating from 12x to 18x

recommendations.title: Engage with ESG Rating Agencies Proactively
recommendations.description: Establish regular dialogue with ESG rating agencies to improve scores and target CDP A-list inclusion to gain valuation premium.
recommendations.profitability_link: Achieving CDP A-list status can increase valuation by 5-10%, potentially adding ₹1000-₹2000 Cr in market cap.
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Competitors improved ESG ratings leading to fund inflows and valuation gains

recommendations.title: Initiate Renewable Energy Capacity Expansion
recommendations.description: Commit to increasing renewable energy portfolio to at least 50% by 2030, matching industry peers to mitigate transition risk and attract green financing.
recommendations.profitability_link: Unlocking green financing can reduce cost of capital by 30 bps, saving ₹90-₹150 Cr annually; potential valuation premium of 5-10%.
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Tata Power issued ₹5000 Cr green bonds to fund renewables expansion

immediate_high.title: Develop and Disclose Comprehensive Transition Plan
Engage with ESG Rating Agencies Proactively

immediate_low.title: Enhance BRSR and GRI ESG Reporting Quality
